title: Section 29
content: (1) A registered society shall not make a loan to any person other than a member: Provided that, with the general or special sanction of the Registrar, a registered society may make loans to another registered society. (2) Save with the sanction of the Registrar, a society with unlimited liability shall not lend money on the security of moveable property. (3) The State Government may, by general or special order, prohibit or restrict the lending of money on mortgage of immoveable property by any registered society or class of registered societies.
